title: Pizza Prices Scraper - Input
description: Scrape pizza menu prices from major US franchises. Specify which franchises to scrape and a zip code for location-based pricing.

franchises.sectionDescription: Select which pizza franchises to scrape. Prices vary by location.
franchises.title: Franchises
franchises.description: List of franchises: dominos, pizzahut, papajohns, littlecaesars

zipCode.title: Zip Code
zipCode.description: US zip code for location-based pricing. 5 digits only.

maxResults.sectionDescription: Control how many results are returned.
maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of pizza prices to return (1-200). Free users: max 25.

requestIntervalSecs.title: Request interval (seconds)
requestIntervalSecs.description: Minimum seconds between requests. Higher = more polite to servers.
